name: CRED. SAISON CO.LTD
summary: Credit Saison Co., Ltd. provides leasing, finance, real estate, and entertainment services in Japan and internationally. The company offers credit, prepaid and debit cards, and loan collection agency services; and payment solutions and business support services for corporate activities, as well as marketing solutions. It also provides finance lease, business-use installment sales, and rental services for office automation equipment, LED lighting products, and others; credit guarantees for unsecured personal loans; mortgage, asset formation, and real estate investment loans; and digital payment and asset management services. The company was formerly known as Seibu Credit Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Credit Saison Co., Ltd. in October 1989. Credit Saison Co., Ltd. was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
